parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, lead_id: $json.lead_id, client_id: $json.client_id, intent: $json.intent, override_script: $json.override_script }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Pull video_render_id from script-generator response. Bail early on
// failure so the caller sees a useful error rather than a render call

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, status: $json.status || 500, error: $json.error || 'orchestration failed', upstream: $json.upstream || null }) }}

meta.notes: MCP-side video orchestrator. Wraps the existing script-generator + heygen-render workflows into a single internal-call surface so MCP generate_video, birthday cron, welcome-video trigger, and any other automation can kick off the full pipeline (script -> render -> delivery on callback) with one webhook call. Body: { internal_secret, lead_id, client_id, intent, override_script?, delivery_channel? }. Returns video_render_id + status='rendering'. Actual delivery happens on HeyGen callback (5-30 min later) via clx-heygen-webhook-v1 -> clx-video-delivery-router-v1.
